mathematical_role: Per-T threshold-current distribution / CDF used to build S_CDF(I) and PMF rows (PT_matrix); backbone for residual strip dS = S - S_CDF.
interpretation_status: Barrier geometry in I-space; not a single scalar—encoded in quantiles / SVD scores / summary stats.
best_predictive_proxy: PT quantile spreads used in aging prediction (e.g. spread90_50 + kappa1)
best_geometric_proxy: spread90_50; asymmetry; skew_pt_weighted; q90-q50; barrier_descriptors joins
best_physical_proxy_candidate: Mean/median threshold; std_threshold; asym_q_barrier from cross-experiment barrier tables
primary_paper_observable: spread90_50 (q90-q50) + state scalar kappa1 for R(T); full PMF row for switching
notes: Minimal basis in repo_state lists X R A; PT is the switching-side object that feeds both tail features and geometry scalars.

mathematical_role: Rank-1 coefficient on Phi1 in residual decomposition; kappaAll / kappa in tables.
interpretation_status: Couples barrier landscape (width/tail) and peak current; 'collective' amplitude of first mode.
best_physical_proxy_candidate: Amplitude of rank-1 correction to PT backbone (closure / full-prediction hierarchy)
primary_paper_observable: W = q90-q50 (mA) and S_peak jointly; report as rank-1 amplitude not a single barrier number
notes: KAPPA1_PREDICTABLE_FROM_PT=YES; KAPPA1_TAIL_DOMINATED=NO (q50 comparable to q90). Older coeff_physics (18B) used different tail construct—prefer 20A for paper.

mathematical_role: Rank-2 amplitude (rel_orth_leftover_norm / Phi2 coefficient) on common residual grid.
interpretation_status: Strongly co-varies with I_peak and normalized forms; mode-2 shape mixes width/derivative kernels.
best_geometric_proxy: I_peak_mA; gap quantiles; kappa2/kappa1 or kappa2/S_peak normalizations
best_physical_proxy_candidate: Second singular direction / orthogonal leftover after rank-1
primary_paper_observable: I_peak_mA primary scalar; pair with barrier spread context if space allows
notes: KAPPA2_SIMPLE_PREDICTABLE=YES with I_peak; MODE2_REAL=YES; Phi2 LOO stability poor (phi2 report)—interpret kappa2 as amplitude onto a somewhat unstable mode shape.

interpretation_status: Split into alpha_geom (PT fit) + alpha_res; residual spikes 22–24 K band.
best_predictive_proxy: alpha ~ skew_pt_weighted + width_mA (best LOOCV among searched PT+switching features; Agent 20B)
best_physical_proxy_candidate: PT-asymmetry of quantile spreads (bulk vs tail)
primary_paper_observable: asymmetry + skew_pt_weighted for geometry story; alpha_res for regime remainder
notes: Adding kappa1 to PT spread model worsens LOOCV (Agent 21C)—do not claim simple closure alpha=f(PT,kappa1). ALPHA_PREDICTABLE_FROM_PT=PARTIAL.

mathematical_role: First mode shape from residual SVD / rank-1 spatial pattern on x-grid.
interpretation_status: Dominant spatial correction to CDF backbone; high explained variance.
best_predictive_proxy: N/A (shape not a scalar)—prediction goes through kappa1_hat * Phi1
best_geometric_proxy: Empirical Phi1 on x; correlation with dS strip ~0.95 rank-1 model
best_physical_proxy_candidate: Collective single-mode deformation of switching curve in normalized x
primary_paper_observable: Refer to rank-1 spatial mode; cite closure_report M2 vs M1
notes: Rank-1 explains most LOOCV gain for S strip (Agents 23C/24C ~79% vs PT-only).

mathematical_role: Second SVD mode / orthogonal complement direction on grid.
interpretation_status: Kernel-mixture (dPhi1/dx; x*Phi1) but not pure span; regime-dependent stability.
best_predictive_proxy: Subleading in aggregate LOOCV (~0.6% after rank-1; full prediction report)
best_geometric_proxy: Shape metrics: even/odd fraction; localization; kernel correlations
best_physical_proxy_candidate: Width-asymmetry / shoulder structure—not a simple geometric scalar
primary_paper_observable: Describe as second spatial mode; avoid over-claiming stable physical label
notes: PHI2_STABLE=NO (min LOO cosine low); PHI2_SIMPLE_KERNEL_REDUCIBLE=YES—use careful language.

mathematical_role: delta_theta; delta_theta_smoothed; ds_step; kappa_curve; arc_length along (kappa1,kappa2) in T.
interpretation_status: Reorganization / path in collective state plane; bend ~22–24 K in Agent 19C.
best_predictive_proxy: delta_theta_smoothed_rad selected for alpha_res_hat in full S prediction (tiny LOOCV gain)
best_geometric_proxy: ds_step; kappa_curve; geometric bend angle in (kappa1,kappa2)
best_physical_proxy_candidate: Regime reorganization path—not required for S prediction at current thresholds
primary_paper_observable: Mention for R and state narrative; optional subleading term for S
notes: TRAJECTORY_IMPROVES_S = NEGLIGIBLE (24C). AGING: trajectory beats naive but not PT SVD baseline (23B). Agent 24B: trajectory does not improve R beyond PT+kappa1.

mathematical_role: Relaxation timescale A (Relax_tau_T / global tau per results_system).
interpretation_status: Linked to switching via X and S_peak with documented peak alignment tradeoffs.
best_predictive_proxy: X = I_peak/(w*S_peak) for power-law bridge (speak_vs_x report)
best_geometric_proxy: S_peak (inverse correlation but dT_peak mismatch vs A)
primary_paper_observable: X as unified bridge coordinate for A(T)
notes: S_peak alone peaks wrong vs A; X preferred for coherent A+R story per cross-experiment report.

mathematical_role: Aging clock ratio R = tau_FM / tau_dip (repo_state).
interpretation_status: Interpolated R_T on barrier grid used in cross-experiment merges.
primary_paper_observable: spread90_50 + kappa1; cite PT SVD as strong compact summary
